title: Carlos the Taco (IndieGala) Giveaway
description: Become the Taco! Finally, a free game made for taco fans! Download Carlos the Taco for free on IndieGala. Carlos the Taco is a 2D platformer set in Mexico where you play as a taco!

title: 8AM (Steam) Giveaway
description: Score 8AM for free via Steam! "8AM" is a 3d first-person suspense game where you find yourself trapped in a room, watching a family through cameras.

title: 911 Operator (Mobile) Giveaway
description:
911 Operator is free this week on the Epic Games Store App for iPhone, iPad, and Android.

Note: May not be available in all regions

title: DOOMBLADE (Epic Games) Giveaway
description: Are you looking for a Metroidvania? Grab DOOMBLADE for free on Epic Games Store! DOOMBLADE is a 2D Action Metroidvania with a fast-paced movement-combat system.

title: Nocturnal (Steam) Giveaway
description: Time to wield some flames today! Grab Nocturnal for free on Steam until April 36! Nocturnal is a cool 2D action-platformer featuring fire-wielding mechanics. Don´t miss it!

title: Ashanti Protocol-Unmanned peacekeepers amidst conflict (Stove) Giveaway
description: Grab Ashanti Protocol-Unmanned peacekeepers amidst conflict for free via STOVE Store!

title: Aeonic (Steam) Giveaway
description: Grab Aeonic for free via Steam until April 29!

title: The Whispering Valley (GOG) Giveaway
description: Who wouldn’t want to explore a remote village? Grab The Whispering Valley for free via GOG, a 3D point-and-click game where you can explore a village and solve complex puzzles.

title: Emily_ (itchio) Giveaway
description: Curious about AI? Forget ChatGPT, Gemini, or even Claude, try talking to Emily instead. Emily_ is free on Itch.io for a limited time. Start a conversation… and see where it leads.

title: The Lost Painter (itchio) Giveaway
description: Are you into liminal spaces? You can grab The Lost Painter for free on itch.io, it’s a single-player, first-person atmospheric walking sim.
